Describe the sequence of major visual scenes presented throughout the video clip.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a boxy spacecraft with blue thrusters flies near a cratered planet; at 6s, a humanoid figure with dark skin and a green robe appears against a brown background; at 10s, the figure is shown with color bars and dripping red liquid; at 12s, text reading SIGNAL JAM DETECTED overlays the screen.

question: Detail the specific visual changes occurring during the transmission signal interruption segments.
canonical_answer: At 2s, blue engine lights glow on a grey spacecraft; at 6s, a robed figure with wrinkled skin stands still; at 10s, pink text appears over television color bars while liquid drips; at 12s, additional purple text reading UNAUTHORIZED TRANSMISSIONS becomes visible below the initial warning message.
